creator: bms@incunabulum.net
text:
Just to confirm our conversation on IRC:

I tried ugen as root as suggested. I have now tweaked /etc/devfs.rules
to chown ugen nodes to bms. digikam, gtkam and gphoto2 are now able
to manage the camera.

umass, however, still doesn't work, and this is a mystery, although
I do rather like being able to use the new PTP protocol.

The Olympus camera has to be put into 'print' mode to use PTP with FreeBSD.

Thank you for all your help!
BMS
